summary: The blocking `readLibrary()` regression is gone because `mcp-gateway` was reverted out of `data/library.json`, while its non-conformant manifest kinds remain intentionally outside `capabilityKinds`. The remaining s1c fixes also hold in source: `runner.up()` now emits the stderr downgrade warning when souls assembly returns null with modes+`mcp-gateway` present, and it now exports `GARRISON_ORCHESTRATOR_FITTING_ID` alongside `GARRISON_SOULS_CONFIG`, which `http-gateway` consumes.
